summary: Good-quality recording with a few tape‑speed blips, showcasing an inspired set highlighted by Wharf Rat > Gimme and a soaring Bertha > Good Lovin'
review: The reviewer praises the overall sound of the 441‑tape source despite minor speed‑related blips in the Help>Slip sequence, calling the recording good. Musically the show is described as a delightful mix of inspired moments and flubby playing, with standout performances of Wharf Rat > Gimme, Playin Reprise, Bertha > Good Lovin' and a fitting Casey Jones finale.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments about the performance and generally good recording quality, tempered by minor tape‑speed issues; only one detailed review limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall great recordings from the 441 tapes, but Help>Slip shows a few blips due to speed and the first Gimme Some Lovin is messy.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A night full of surprises with a mix of inspired and flubby playing; strong space leading into beautifully developed sequences and an energetic finish.

band_member_comments.Phil: Positive mention of Phil leading a bust‑out segment, prompting the reviewer for more.
